West Bengal

Bijanbari

The Riverside Retreat

Riverside tranquility where clear mountain water flows over smooth stones, surrounded by mossy cliffs.

4.2
(54 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
22°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Bijanbari

Bijanbari is a serene village along the Rangeet River, surrounded by tea gardens and cardamom plantations. A perfect offbeat getaway.

A traditional agricultural village known for its organic farming and peaceful environment.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
1,100 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.2 (54 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
